work_unit: android liveBus WS message size cap (M-ANDROID-001)
situation: audit-2026-07-07-034 M-ANDROID-001: android/index.html liveBus WebSocket onmessage 直接 JSON.parse(ev.data) 无大小上限，与服务端 relay_bridge.py 64KB MAX_MSG_SIZE 不对称。恶意/异常大帧可致客户端 DoS。派生 fix。
action: 在 ws.onmessage handler 入口加 64KB 字符串长度守卫：超限 warn + drop，不触发 JSON.parse。保持与服务端限制对称。
outcome_evidence: commit 4680f5a on auto/opt-android-1783372989, pushed to origin. liveBus ws.onmessage now guards ev.data.length > 65536 before JSON.parse.
next_suggestion: monitor opt-android-1783372989 for human merge; once merged mark M-ANDROID-001 merged in audit-cycle-state → cycle-complete triggers next full audit
scout-scan #1 shizi PROGRESS.md stale 7.7d — refresh if no pending fix work

audit_findings.finding: liveBus ws.onmessage accepts arbitrarily large frames before JSON.parse; no client-side size cap unlike server-side relay_bridge.py 64KB limit
audit_findings.remediation: Add 64KB length guard at onmessage entry; drop + console.warn oversized frames
